alkylation reagent: performed the nitrosoproteomic analysis using iodo-TMT labelling
alkylation concentration: added a final concentration of 20 mM sodium ascorbate
cleavage agent: Trypsin (Promega) was added to the protein solution
fractionation method: fractionated by high pH reverse-phase HPLC
instrument: sample was proceeded to MS/MS of Q ExactiveTM Plus
labeling: performed the nitrosoproteomic analysis using iodo-TMT labelling
reduction reagent: add a final concentration of 20 mM DTT
reduction concentration: add a final concentration of 20 mM DTT
